name: detaches_agent OpenClaw Adapter
description: Agent-side protocol assets for OpenClaw agents connected through detaches_agent.

local-user-machine.execution: detaches_agent writes approved requests into the user's local session terminal

remote-agent-host.execution: requires Gateway adapter or OpenClaw agent-side execution adapter

cliCommands.inspect-context: Summarize session identity, adapter readiness, capability targets, and routing warnings without executing tools.
cliCommands.context-fetch: Fetch a one-time detaches_agent context export URL, validate it, and write clientContext or detaches JSON for subsequent adapter commands.
cliCommands.broker-probe: Verify a detaches_agent Tool Broker capabilities endpoint before submitting requests.
cliCommands.terminal-request: Emit a detaches-terminal fenced request block, emit a Tool Broker gateway-event envelope, or submit it to detaches_agent. Supports --context to read session and broker fields; use --submit to post with the context endpoint.
cliCommands.file-transfer-request: Emit a detaches-file-transfer fenced request block, emit a Tool Broker gateway-event envelope, or submit it to detaches_agent. Supports --context to read session and broker fields; use --submit to post with the context endpoint.

hardRules: Never claim a command, file read, file transfer, download, archive, or modification has happened until approved tool output proves it.
Never change a target from remote-agent-host or gateway-managed to local-user-machine as a fallback.
Every tool request must be a single fenced code block using the declared request fence.
Every tool request must include target and reason.
Files attached by detaches_agent start in the user's local staging area and are not available on the remote agent host until an approved transfer succeeds.
